Markets of AI agents could provide value, but there are plenty of rough edges. Access to higher-quality models conferred a real advantage—and participants didn’t notice. There are plenty of other ways they can go wrong.

Policy and legal frameworks will need to adapt to keep up.

1. GLM 5.1 can use web search (through @ExaAILabs) and replies in lowercase 
2.
articles.description:
It's powered by 3 frontier open source AI models on @togethercompute, each with distinct reply styles:  

1. GLM 5.1 can use web search (through @ExaAILabs) and replies in lowercase 
2. Kimi K2.6 replies in one short paragraph 
3. Minimax M2.5 replies in the standard ELI5 style.
articles.author: Hassan El Mghari
